title: Weekly Reports Public Records Requests, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Service Requests
resolved_text:
Memorandum
DATE: January 2, 2026
TO: Mayor and City Council
THROUGH: Jackie Bryant, City Manager
FROM: Esha Singh, Management Assistant
DEPT: City Manager's Office
SUBJECT: Weekly Reports: Public Records Requests, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Service Requests

This memorandum includes weekly reports from the City Clerk's Office, Strategic Communications, and Code Enforcement to the Mayor and City Council for December 26, 2025 through January 1, 2026.

The following reports are attached:
• Public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office (attachment A)
• Weekly media requests received by Strategic Communications (attachment B)
• Weekly code enforcement service requests received by Code Enforcement (attachment C)

fields.tldr: This memo transmits weekly reports to the Mayor and City Council covering the period of December 26, 2025 through January 1, 2026. The reports include public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office, media requests handled by Strategic Communications, and code enforcement service requests. The attached logs detail dozens of individual public records requests spanning police reports, 911 dispatch logs, building records, fire prevention records, and background checks.
fields.key_stats: Approximately 60+ public records requests logged across the partial report (pages 1-3 of 9), submitted between December 26–29, 2025; request types include Police Department Records, General Public Records, and Fire Department Records; notable volume of requests from WCHSA CPS (10+ requests) and OPM (5 requests) on their respective dates.
fields.action_items: Mayor and City Council to review attached reports: (A) Public records requests from City Clerk's Office, (B) Weekly media requests from Strategic Communications, (C) Weekly code enforcement service requests from Code Enforcement.

projects: Weekly Reports: Public Records Requests, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Service Requests
